summary: Made a surgical opening-seam clarification so the copied key given to Lin at the end of chapter 5 carries cleanly into chapter 6 as the same overnight object and gesture. The Blue Hour exit into chapter 7 already tracked cleanly, so it was left intact.
edits: Added a brief opening reference to the copied key beside Lin's receipt stacks to carry forward the prior chapter's final image.
Clarified that Mira lifts the same key from beside the receipts before putting it back in Lin's palm, avoiding a duplicate-feeling handoff beat.
